other_findings: Pre-B cells are detected between 7-8 PCW in fetal liver, but mature B cells only after 9 PCW (Popescu et al., 2019)
Pre-B cells represent a late precursor stage before immature B cell formation
Express the pre-B cell receptor on the membrane
Pre-B cells in NLT (non-lymphoid tissues including skin) are present (Popescu et al., 2019)
Pre-B cells undergo Ig light chain rearrangement
evidence_quotes: Pre-B cells are detected between 7-8 PCW, but mature B cells only after 9 PCW
Comparing liver with yolk sac and NLT, pro-B, pre-B and B cells are present in NLT but HSC/MPPs and pre pro-B cells are absent
